예레미야 22:1.content: Yahweh said, “Go down to the house of the king of Judah, and speak this word, there:

예레미야 22:2.content: ‘Hear Yahweh’s word, king of Judah, who sits on David’s throne, you, your servants, and your people who enter in by these gates.

예레미야 22:3.content: Yahweh says: “Execute justice and righteousness, and deliver him who is robbed out of the hand of the oppressor. Do no wrong. Do no violence to the foreigner, the fatherless, or the widow. Don’t shed innocent blood in this place.

예레미야 22:4.content: For if you do this thing indeed, then kings sitting on David’s throne will enter in by the gates of this house, riding in chariots and on horses, he, his servants, and his people.

예레미야 22:5.content: But if you will not hear these words, I swear by myself,” says Yahweh, “that this house will become a desolation.” ’ ”

예레미야 22:6.content: For Yahweh says concerning the house of the king of Judah: “You are Gilead to me, the head of Lebanon. Yet surely I will make you a wilderness, cities which are not inhabited.

예레미야 22:7.content: I will prepare destroyers against you, everyone with his weapons, and they will cut down your choice cedars, and cast them into the fire.

예레미야 22:8.content: “Many nations will pass by this city, and they will each ask his neighbor, ‘Why has Yahweh done this to this great city?’

예레미야 22:9.content: Then they will answer, ‘Because they abandoned the covenant of Yahweh their God, worshiped other gods, and served them.’ ”

예레미야 22:10.content: Don’t weep for the dead. Don’t bemoan him; but weep bitterly for him who goes away, for he will return no more, and not see his native country.

예레미야 22:11.content: For Yahweh says touching Shallum the son of Josiah, king of Judah, who reigned instead of Josiah his father, and who went out of this place: “He won’t return there any more.

예레미야 22:12.content: But he will die in the place where they have led him captive. He will see this land no more.”

예레미야 22:13.content: “Woe to him who builds his house by unrighteousness, and his rooms by injustice; who uses his neighbor’s service without wages, and doesn’t give him his hire;

예레미야 22:14.content: who says, ‘I will build myself a wide house and spacious rooms,’ and cuts out windows for himself; with a cedar ceiling, and painted with red.

예레미야 22:15.content: “Should you reign, because you strive to excel in cedar? Didn’t your father eat and drink, and do justice and righteousness? Then it was well with him.

예레미야 22:16.content: He judged the cause of the poor and needy; so it was well, then. Wasn’t this to know me?” says Yahweh.

예레미야 22:17.content: But your eyes and your heart are only for your covetousness, for shedding innocent blood, for oppression, and for doing violence.”

예레미야 22:18.content: Therefore Yahweh says concerning Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah: “They won’t lament for him, saying, ‘Ah my brother!’ or, ‘Ah sister!’ They won’t lament for him, saying ‘Ah lord!’ or, ‘Ah his glory!’

예레미야 22:19.content: He will be buried with the burial of a donkey, drawn and cast out beyond the gates of Jerusalem.”

예레미야 22:20.content: “Go up to Lebanon, and cry. Lift up your voice in Bashan, and cry from Abarim; for all your lovers have been destroyed.

예레미야 22:21.content: I spoke to you in your prosperity; but you said, ‘I will not listen.’ This has been your way from your youth, that you didn’t obey my voice.

예레미야 22:22.content: The wind will feed all your shepherds, and your lovers will go into captivity. Surely then you will be ashamed and confounded for all your wickedness.

예레미야 22:23.content: Inhabitant of Lebanon, who makes your nest in the cedars, how greatly to be pitied you will be when pangs come on you, the pain as of a woman in travail!

예레미야 22:24.content: “As I live,” says Yahweh, “though Coniah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah were the signet on my right hand, I would still pluck you from there.

예레미야 22:25.content: I would give you into the hand of those who seek your life, and into the hand of them of whom you are afraid, even into the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon, and into the hand of the Chaldeans.

예레미야 22:26.content: I will cast you out with your mother who bore you into another country, where you were not born; and there you will die.

예레미야 22:27.content: But to the land to which their soul longs to return, there they will not return.”

예레미야 22:28.content: Is this man Coniah a despised broken vessel? Is he a vessel in which no one delights? Why are they cast out, he and his offspring, and cast into a land which they don’t know?

예레미야 22:29.content: O earth, earth, earth, hear Yahweh’s word!

예레미야 22:30.content: Yahweh says, “Record this man as childless, a man who will not prosper in his days; for no more will a man of his offspring prosper, sitting on David’s throne, and ruling in Judah.”
